name: All-in-One-Breakfast
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the toasted bread on a baking sheet.
2. If desired, spread butter evenly over the toast.
3. Cover the toast with mushroom slices and tomato slices.
4. Sprinkle grated Parmesan cheese and crumbled bacon on top.
5. Bake in a 350°F (175°C) oven until the cheese melts.
Nutritional Information:
- 1 serving: 147 calories or 1 bread, 1 fat, and 1 lean meat exchange (without butter)
- 1 serving: 182 calories or 1 bread, 2 fats, and 1 lean meat exchange (with butter)
